browser/audio.notes: Production browser/gfx/xr runtime realism is enforced by gfx runtime profile and xr productization release gates.

browser/input.notes: Production browser/gfx/xr runtime realism is enforced by gfx runtime profile and xr productization release gates.

browser/storage.notes: Production browser/gfx/xr runtime realism is enforced by gfx runtime profile and xr productization release gates.

browser/window.notes: Production browser/gfx/xr runtime realism is enforced by webxr conformance and xr productization release gates.

core/media.notes: Deterministic, policy-gated image/audio format families are implemented for mainstream transcoding workflows.

core/pkg-low.notes: Native and WASI-flavor remote registry publish/install/export/import parity is enforced by runtime parity and contract-pack gates.

core/store.notes: Remote store parity for native and WASI-flavor lanes is enforced through explicit runtime parity scenarios.

core/sync.notes: Push/pull/ref-update parity and chunk-upload coverage are enforced in runtime parity and sync registry conformance tests.

editor/task.notes: Schema-driven task orchestration and workflow task kinds are implemented with deterministic partial-output contracts.

gfx/audio.notes: Production gfx/browser/xr runtime realism is enforced by gfx runtime profile and xr productization release gates.

gfx/gpu.notes: Device-backed gpu contracts are enforced by runtime profile, lane conformance matrix, and stack decoupling gates.

gfx/input.notes: Production gfx/browser/xr runtime realism is enforced by gfx runtime profile and xr productization release gates.

gfx/time.notes: Production gfx/browser/xr runtime realism is enforced by gfx runtime profile and xr productization release gates.

gfx/window.notes: Production gfx/browser/xr runtime realism is enforced by gfx runtime profile and xr productization release gates.

gfx/xr.notes: Production gfx/browser/xr runtime realism is enforced by gfx runtime profile, webxr lane conformance, and xr productization gates.

gpu/compute.notes: Device-backed gpu compute contracts are enforced by runtime profile, lane conformance matrix, and stack decoupling gates.

host/ffi.notes: FFI operations are intentionally deny-by-default and excluded from prelude surface until explicit policy enablement.
